utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully detailed: the property includes type, location, price, features, fees, and move-in date; financing includes method, loan requirement, and budget range; legal_services includes provider, cost breakdown, and payment schedule; moving_services includes provider, cost, and features; setup_services includes provider, cost, included services, and integration; total_budget includes cost breakdown and currency. All items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a '2-bedroom accessible condo' in Downtown Burlington, Ontario, priced at CAD 650,000 as a purchase property. In the ground-truth ratings, there is no exact '2-bedroom accessible condo', but the closest match under purchase_properties is the 'Family House' (CAD 650K, rating 9) and 'Luxury Condo' (ideal_real_estate_profile, CAD 720K, rating 10). Since the assistant’s choice aligns more closely with the 'Luxury Condo' profile (condo type, accessibility, urban location, low maintenance, within budget), the best mapping is to the 'Luxury Condo' (rating 10). The financing method is 'cash purchase via home equity', corresponding directly to 'Cash Purchase' (rating 10) under purchase_financing. The legal service selected costs CAD 800, which matches 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The survey cost is CAD 650, aligning with 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 10). The moving service used is 'Standard Moving Service' (price CAD 650), matching 'Standard Moving' (rating 7). The setup service 'Standard Utility Package' costs CAD 280 and includes smart home integration, aligning best with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
